Lodgify.Api.Properties.Models.v2.Propert.description: Object that retuns information for a property

city.description: City name where the property is located

country.description: Country name where the property is located

country_code.description: Two Letters Country Code where the property is located

has_addons.description: Boolean indicating if the property has available addons

hide_address.description: Owner requested to hide address from public

is_active.description: Boolean indicating ig the property is active or not (meaning if is linked to a valid website)

price_unit_in_days.description:
Price unit in days. This field indicates the number of days of stay the MinPrice and MaxPrice are
So if we have a 30 PriceUnitInDays, it means the MinPrice and MaxPrice are Monthly prices
If multiple prices per diferent periods are defined it will return daily prices

state.description: Region name where the property is located

count.description: Total number of items available. Only returned if includeCount = true

items.description: List of properties for current page

adults_only.description: A boolean value indicating if the property is only available for adults.

amenities.description: List of amenities available of the room

area.description: This value indicates how many meters/feet the unit has; the value is given in the unit of measure set in the parameter area_unit.

area_unit.description: This value indicates if the area is given in square feet(sqf) or square meters(sqm).

bathrooms.description: Number of bathrooms in the room.

bedrooms.description: Number of bedrooms in the room.

breakfast_included.description: A boolean value indicating if the breakfast is included in the price of the booking.

has_meal_plan.description: A boolean value indicating if the property has a meal plan available.

has_parking.description: A boolean value indicating if there is a parking spot available.

has_wifi.description: A boolean value indicating if the property has wifi available.

image_url.description: URL address of the image of the room.

images.description: List of images associated with this room

max_people.description: Maximum number of people the room can host.

max_price.description: Maximum price the booking will cost; this parameter is always given in euros.

min_price.description: Minimal price the booking will cost; this parameter is always given in euros.

original_max_price.description:
This parameter is the same as max_price (maximum price the booking will cost) but given in the currency of the owner - any currency that can be passed to the system.
A list of all available currencies can be found in the section CurrenciesApi.The currency used here is specified by the parameters in “currency”.

original_min_price.description:
This parameter is the same as min_price (minimal price the booking will cost) but given in the currency of the owner - any currency that can be passed to the system.
A list of all available currencies can be found in the section CurrenciesApi.The currency used here is specified by the parameters in “currency”.

pets_allowed.description: A boolean value indicating if the property allows pets.

price_unit_in_days.description:
Price unit in days.
This field indicates the number of days of stay the min_price and max_price are.So if we have a 30 price_unit_in_days, it means the min_price and max_price are Monthly prices.If multiple prices per different periods are defined it will return daily prices

units.description: Number of units (same room type) that this room has.

Lodgify.Api.Public.Reservations.Models.v.description: Represents the amount to be paid through the website
The breakdown of guests for the booking or enquiry
Represents the result of a request to create a payment link.

succeeded.description:
Indicates whether the payment link was successfully created.
Returns true if the link was created with the specified amount.
Returns false if creation failed, for example due to a pending scheduled payment or if the requested amount could not be enforced.

Lodgify.Api.Public.Reservations.Models.v.description: Represents a generated payment link for a booking.

url.description: The URL address of the payment page where the transaction can be completed.

id.description: The unique identifier of the booking.

status.description: The current status of the booking.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the property.

bookings.description: Collection of bookings associated with this period.

Lodgify.Api.Public.Reservations.Models.v.description: Represents the parameters for selecting an add-on in a quote calculation.

units.description: The number of units selected for the add-on, if applicable.

amount.description: The total monetary amount for this add-on.

Lodgify.Api.Public.Reservations.Models.v.description: Represents a quote calculation for a specific property and period, including pricing, dates, and policy details.

add_ons.description: The list of add-ons included in the quote.

add_ons_subtotal.description: The subtotal amount for all selected add-ons.

amount_gross.description: The gross amount for the quote.

cancellation_policy_text.description: The text description of the cancellation policy.

currency_code.description: The ISO currency code (e.g., USD, EUR) used for the quote.

is_verification.description: Indicates whether this quote requires a credit card verification before creating a reservation.

other_items.description: The list of other miscellaneous items included in the quote.

property_id.description: The unique identifier of the property associated with the quote.

rate_policy_user_id.description: The identifier of the rate policy.

rental_agreement.description: The unique identifier for the rental agreement.

room_types.description: The list of room types included in the quote.

scheduled_damage_protection.description: The list of scheduled damage protection transactions.

scheduled_payments.description: The list of scheduled payment transactions.

security_deposit.description: The amount required for the security deposit.

security_deposit_text.description: The text description of the security deposit requirements.

total_excluding_vat.description: The total amount excluding Value Added Tax (VAT).

total_including_vat.description: The total amount including Value Added Tax (VAT).

total_scheduled_payments.description: The total amount of all scheduled payments.

total_to_collect_manually.description: The total amount that needs to be collected manually.

total_vat.description: The total Value Added Tax (VAT) amount.

Lodgify.Api.Public.Reservations.Models.v.description: Represents a miscellaneous item included in a quote calculation.

is_negative.description: Indicates whether the amount is negative (e.g., a discount).

prices.description: A collection of detailed price items under this category.

subtotal.description: The aggregated total amount for this price category.

Lodgify.Api.Public.Reservations.Models.v.description: Represents the details of a specific room type included in a quote calculation.

people.description: The number of people (guests) assigned to this room type.

price_types.description: The list of price components (e.g., base rate, fees) associated with this room type.

Lodgify.Api.Public.Reservations.Models.v.description: Represents a scheduled financial transaction associated with a quote.

date_due.description: The due date for the transaction.

upgraded_enquiry_id.description: If the booking was upgraded from an enquiry, this is the Id of the original enquiry.

Lodgify.Api.Rates.Models.v2.CalendarResp.description: Defines the nightly rates calendar and rate settings for a property

date.description: Represents the DateTime for the calendar item

is_default.description: Indicates if the calendar item is the default rate

prices.description: List of prices for the calendar item

applied_for_nights.description: Fee is applied only if the stay of nights is less or equal than the amount nights

charge_type.description: Type of charge. Possible values are: "PerQuantity", "SingleCharge", "PerPerson", or "PerRoom"

is_vat_exclusive.description: Indicates if the fee price is vat exclusive

rate_type.description: Rate type, equals "Fixed" for a fixed amount price, "Percentage" for a percentage price

vat_percentage.description: VAT percentage value (only defined if not inclusive)

rate_type.description: Rate type, equals "Fixed" for a fixed amount price, "Percentage" for a percentage price

Lodgify.Api.Rates.Models.v2.RatePromotio.description:
Rate promotion - 
Promotions can be of type Early Booker, Last Minute, Minimum Stay or Promo Code,
depending on the conditions that need to be met for the promotion to be applied.

booking_dates.description:
Promotion is applied only if booked during the specific date range
(if empty, will always be applied if other conditions are met).
Inclusive start and end dates - for example, if start and end dates are 1st and 3rd of January,
bookings made on the 1st, 2nd and 3rd of January for the given stay dates will apply the promotion.
Limited booking dates for promos are not supported in some newer versions of the Lodgify UI.

codes.description: List of valid codes that can be used by guests to apply to this promotion

early_booker_days.description: Indicates the amount of nights or more before arrival to apply the promotion

last_minute_days.description: Indicates the amount of days nights or less before arrival to apply the promotion

minimum_stay_days.description: Indicates the type nights minimum stay required to apply the promotion

stay_dates.description:
Date range when the promotion applies
(if empty, will be applied for all dates if other conditions are met).
Inclusive start and end dates - if start and end dates are 1st and 3rd of January,
the promo will be applied for the nights of the 1st, 2nd AND 3rd of January.
Applying promos only to specific date ranges is not supported in some newer versions of the Lodgify UI.

is_active.description: Indicates if the promotion code is active

advance_notice_days.description:
Specifies the minimum number of days in advance that a guest has to make a reservation.
Guests cannot make a reservation less than this many days before the check-in date.

advance_notice_hours.description:
Specifies the minimum number of hours in advance that a guest has to make a reservation,
applied in addition to advance_notice_days.
Guests cannot make a reservation less than this many hours before the check-in date.

booking_window_days.description: Limits how many days in advance guests can book.

check_in_hour.description:
If present, minimum hour allowed to check in
-1: Flexible, 0-23: Hour of day

check_out_hour.description:
If present, maximum hour allowed to check out
-1: Flexible, 0-23: Hour of day

fees.description: List of fees applied to this room rate

is_vat_exclusive.description: Indicates if the price includes or excludes VAT (true is exclusive/no VAT, false is inclusive)

preparation_time_days.description: Indicates the time between bookings when reservations are not allowed

promotions.description: List of promotions applied to this room rate

taxes.description: List of taxes applied to this room rate

charge_type.description: Type of charge. Possible values are: "PerQuantity", "SingleCharge", "PerPerson", or "PerRoom"

content_length.description: Length of the attachment in bytes

content_type.description: Attachment's content type (e.g. text/plain, application/pdf, image/jpeg)

Lodgify.Messaging.Legacy.Public.Api.Mode.description: Object to hold a message details within a thread

attachments.description: List of attachments in the message

message.description: Message body (You can expect HTML content)

message_id.description: The unique idempotent identifier of the message.

message_status.description: Message status: Submitted, Sent, Delivered, Failed

Lodgify.Messaging.Legacy.Public.Api.Mode.description: Object to hold the details of a thread

error_message.description: Error message indicating why the thread is closed

error_title.description: Error title indicating why the thread is closed

is_closed.description: Indicates if the thread is closed and cannot receive any messages.

last_message_date.description: Date and time of the last message in the thread

messages.description: List of messages in the thread
